author: Adebola Akomolafe
description: A modern reactive framework for fluid, dynamic web apps.

scripts.build: pnpm run build-core && pnpm run build-web && pnpm run build-ssg && pnpm run build-utils
scripts.publish-core: pnpm --filter retend run build && pnpm --filter retend publish --access public
scripts.publish-web: pnpm --filter retend-web run build && pnpm --filter retend-web publish --access public
scripts.publish-ssg: pnpm --filter retend-server run build && pnpm --filter retend-server publish --access public
scripts.publish-utils: pnpm --filter retend-utils run build && pnpm --filter retend-utils publish --access public
scripts.publish-all: pnpm run publish-core && pnpm run publish-web && pnpm run publish-ssg && pnpm run publish-start && pnpm run publish-utils
scripts.previews: cp README.md packages/retend/README.md && pnpm dlx pkg-pr-new publish './packages/retend' './packages/retend-web' './packages/retend-server' './packages/retend-start' './packages/retend-utils'
